title: Media Verdict
description: Upload a photo, video, or voice clip to check whether it's AI-generated or manipulated.

dropzone.prompt: Drag a file here, or click to browse
dropzone.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, or BMP — up to 10 MB
dropzone.videoHint: MP4, AVI, MOV, or MKV — up to 100 MB
dropzone.audioHint: WAV, FLAC, or OGG — up to 25 MB (file upload only — browser mic recordings aren't accepted here)

loading: Analyzing — this can take a few seconds...

errors.unsupportedType: That file type isn't supported for this check.
